Notice Of Motion To Stay; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support And (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT FRANK CHU's Motion To Stay is Off calendar as moot in light of the parties' stipulation filed May 30, 2018. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Ashwin V. Ladva od the Ladva Law Firm, Tel. No. 1-415-296-8844 appearing
for the Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
Atty. James P. Molinelli of the Gilsleider, McMahon & Phan, Tel. No.
1-925-446-3123 appearing for the Defendant by telephone appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Frank Chu's motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint filed by plaintiff Daniel Gomes is denied. The allegation that Mr. Chu knowingly drove a vehicle while he was intoxicated is sufficient to show malice for purposes of Civil Code 3294(c)(1) and no case construing that subsection holds to the contrary. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
